list3.Unsubstantiated: not proven to be true : not substantiated
list3.Indiscreet: not discreet : imprudent; also : not polite
list3.Ingenious: having or showing an unusual aptitude for discovering, inventing, or contriving
list3.Saga: a prose narrative recorded in Iceland in the 12th and 13th centuries of historic or legendary figures and events of the heroic age of Norway and Iceland
list3.Meres: an expanse of standing water : lake, pool
list3.Incorrigible: incapable of being corrected or amended: such as
